title: Spain beats Argentina in extra time and wins its second World Cup in soccer
summary: The Spanish national team won 1-0 with a goal by Torres in extra time, unleashing joy in Barcelona and tears from Messi in his last World Cup final, while the awards ceremony was marked by boos for President Trump.

title: US and Iran escalate tensions with consecutive attacks and threats of reprisals
summary: US forces launched attacks for the ninth consecutive day against Iran and deployed additional fighter jets in the region, while Tehran stopped complying with the memorandum and oil prices rose.

title: Extreme heat wave in Japan with record temperatures and health alerts
summary: The country recorded 243 points with temperatures exceeding 35°C, the first day of extreme heat in Tokyo and emergency warnings in 39 prefectures, also affecting beaches and tourism.

title: Fire at Asaka military base with no injuries after burning a garbage dump
summary: A fire at the Self-Defense Forces barracks in Tokyo was extinguished after one hour, causing no casualties or major damage.

title: The teams Okinawa Shogaku, Shirakaba Gakuen, and Nichinan Gakuen qualify for the summer Koshien
summary: The three teams won their respective prefectural tournaments and secured their place in the national high school baseball championship, highlighting the two-time champion Okinawa Shogaku.

title: Head-on collision on the Meihan Expressway leaves two dead in Nara
summary: Two light vehicles collided head-on on the national highway, causing the death of two men, possibly due to wrong-way driving.

title: Yoshinobu Yamamoto reaches 10 wins in the MLB season
summary: The Japanese Dodgers pitcher threw a complete game to achieve his tenth win of the year, second consecutive with double digits.

title: Two dead from landslide in Ashikaga, Tochigi
summary: Torrential rains caused a landslide that buried a house; the victims were identified as a couple in their 60s.

title: Two former superiors arrested for murder of a man in Himeji
summary: Police arrested two suspects, including a former boss of the victim, for ordering the homicide that occurred in January.

title: Putin meets with North Korea's foreign minister and thanks for military support
summary: The Russian president expressed his gratitude to Pyongyang for the sending of troops to Ukraine and discussed a possible visit by Kim Jong-un to Russia.

title: Honda extends its alliance with Guangzhou Automobile Group until 2038
summary: The Japanese company renewed for a decade its joint venture with the Chinese state-owned manufacturer to continue vehicle production in the country.

title: Japan to raise out-of-pocket medical expense caps starting in August
summary: The high-cost medical care benefit system will increase monthly limits by up to 7% and establish a new annual cap.

title: Labour's Burnham emerges as next British prime minister with an economic recovery agenda
summary: Burnham promises to tackle the 'lost decade' of growth and stem the exodus of young people with decentralization and revival policies.

title: Woman dies in Nagoya after being hit by a man who fell from a building
summary: A 20-year-old woman died on the street after being struck by the body of a man who fell from a building in the city center.

title: Citizen opposition grows to the reform of the Imperial Household Law
summary: An Asahi Shimbun poll shows that 60% of Japanese do not approve of the law revision, while approval for the Takaichi cabinet falls to 53%.
